case_title: LOPEZ JAIME ENRIQUE VS GUCKENHEIMER INC.

docket_entries.description: TRIAL RESET TO JUN-30-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 08 TRIAL OF MAY-28-1992 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LOPEZ JAIME ENRIQUE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GUCKENHEIMER INC. $200.00 PRINCIPAL, $13.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $213.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
